heading: Parafield Gardens vs Paralowie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Parafield Gardens, South Australia and Paralowie, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Parafield Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Paralowie (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Parafield Gardens or Paralowie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Parafield Gardens has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Paralowie scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Parafield Gardens scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Paralowie scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Parafield Gardens or Paralowie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Parafield Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
